stemHtml: Your aircraft registration is G-ACZG and you have been using the company call sign Skyfall FOUR SEVEN during your flight. When and how may your call sign be changed to the aircraft registration?

options.a: Whenever you think it is convenient, ask ATC and they will instruct you at a convenient time to ”Change your call sign to GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF”.
options.b: Only for safety reasons and when ATC instruct you to ”Change your call sign to GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF”.
options.c: You may use either call sign at any time, because both appear on your flight plan.
options.d: Any time you wish, and you must inform ATC by saying “SKYFALL FOUR SEVEN changing call sign to GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF”.
